title: What is voluntary retirement programme that Microsoft is offering its 8500-plus employees
description: Microsoft is offering voluntary retirement to approximately 7% of its US workforce, marking its first such program in 51 years. This softer approach, unlike previous layoffs, aims to manage costs and reputation amid stock price pressure and AI infrastructure spending. The offer, based on an age and tenure formula, provides a choice for eligible employees.

title: Starting January 1, Deloitte cuts parental leave, PTO, pension, IVF funding in US
description: Deloitte plans to reduce paid family leave from 16 to eight weeks and cut annual paid time off by 5-10 days for a segment of its US workforce starting January 1, 2027. These changes, affecting internal roles under the 'Center' talent model, aim to tailor benefits to market alignment. New pension plan contributions and adoption/surrogacy reimbursements will also cease.

This move removes a hurdle for Kevin Warsh's confirmation as Fed chair. The probe's closure allows scrutiny to continue through the Inspector General's office, with potential for criminal investigation restart if warranted.

KPMG to lay off 10% of US audit team after failed retirement efforts
description: KPMG is set to cut approximately 10% of its US audit partners after voluntary retirement schemes failed to yield desired results. The accounting giant, one of the Big Four, cited a need to align its partnership size with current business demands.

title: Patrick Mahomes $325 million valuation shock: Off-field move amid recovery
description: Patrick Mahomes, the Kansas City Chiefs’ quarterback, is focused on his recovery from his brutal injuries as his wife, Brittany Mahomes stands by his side through all the difficult times. While both Patrick Mahomes and his wife, Brittany Mahomes, have preferred to be private about the star player’s recovery, the high profile couple recently received an update worth a whopping $325 million.

title: Dianna Russini claim shocks: Alleged confession rocks Mike Vrabel saga
description: Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, has publicly announced that he is taking some time off to seek counselling as the alleged affair rumors with Dianna Russini refuse to die down as new details emerge. Amid all the mess, it seems the situation has taken a turn for the worse as Dianna Russini’s husband and child have been dragged into the drama.

title: Fans Heartbroken: Final post of triathlete Mara Flavia Araujo after ironman tragedy
description: Brazilian triathlete Mara Flavia Araujo died during the swimming leg of the Ironman Texas triathlon on April 19, 2026. Her last Instagram post, shared hours earlier, has gone viral after her death. Reports from Chosun.com and Yahoo confirm she went missing during the swim. A close friend revealed she was unwell before the race but still chose to compete.
